rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §26.0025 governs a parental rights handbook and has no operative connection to property tax exemption levels.
quote: The agency shall create and maintain a handbook that explains all rights of a parent regarding the education of the parent's child
_note: No conflict; rule_text is education-related and unrelated to the proposed property tax change.
